name: libxml-sax-expat-perl
title: libxml-sax-expat-perl
summary: Perl module for a SAX2 driver for Expat (XML::Parser)
description:
Perl module for a SAX2 driver for Expat (XML::Parser)
The XML::SAX::Expat module is an implementation of a SAX2 driver sitting on
top of Expat (XML::Parser). It is still incomplete, though most of the basic
SAX2 events should be available.
.
The libxml-sax-expatxs-perl provides an Expat XML parser as an XS module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libxml-sax-expat-perl because Perl module for a SAX2 driver for Expat (XML::Parser).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libxml-sax-expat-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libxml-sax-expat-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libxml-sax-expat-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
